## RFC Proposal Summary

Provide a short summary of the proposed RFC change.

## Motivation

Why is this RFC necessary? What problem does it address?

## Proposed Design

Describe the proposed design in detail.

## Impact

What impact will this change have on the architecture or ecosystem?

## Compatibility Considerations

Will this change affect existing specifications or implementations?
